code: export class CommandsListParser{constructor(){this._commands=[];}flush(){this._commands=[];return true;}parse(wrapper){if(!wrapper)return false;this._commands=[];const count=wrapper.readInt();for(let i=0;i<count;i++){const command=wrapper.readString();const parameters=wrapper.readString();const description=wrapper.readString();this._commands.push({command,parameters,description});}return true;}get commands(){return this._commands;}}
